nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 新不列顛
nodes.summary: 新不列顛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Pied cuckoo-dove、Comb-crested jacana、Australasian darter，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.id: loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039

nodes.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括马来山鹧鸪、红腹角雉、Green-billed coucal等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Pied cuckoo-dove
nodes.summary: Pied cuckoo-dove（Pied cuckoo-dove，学名 Reinwardtoena browni），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于菲利普·斯克莱特、國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄、新不列顛，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。
locations: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联210种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等210种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 菲利普·斯克莱特
nodes.summary: 菲利普·斯克莱特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、褐穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The dove's population is estimated to number 15,000–30,000 total birds; it is listed as being near threatened on the IUCN Red List due to a decline in its population caused by deforestation in the lowland forests it inhabits

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The only known nest was a simple structure made of twigs, found in May 1930 on a ledge overhanging a stream flowing through rocky terrain on the island of New Britain

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The dove's population is estimated to number 15,000–30,000 total birds; it is listed as being near threatened on the IUCN Red List due to a decline in its population caused by deforestation in the lowland forests it inhabits

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is mainly threatened by high levels of logging, although hunting may also present a threat. It was previously considered to be of least concern as the decline in its population was not thought to be high enough for a threatened listing, but was raised to near-threatened in 2008 following estimates of a more rapid fall in its population caused by intense deforestation in lowland forests throughout its range. More recent studies have found that the species is moderately tolerant of habitat degradation and have suggested that it be categorised as being of least concern again

links.label: 受威胁于
